subject: Upgrade of BBS-ep service
commit_message:
Upgrade of BBS-ep service

Upgraded service to use latest DCAE-SDK
Upgraded many of the dependencies to latest versions
Introduced Java 11

Change-Id: I29d265d2a75aa80749f567cfb10920b2c45c2cec
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2105
Signed-off-by: Stavros Kanarakis <stavros.kanarakis@nokia.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(6 comments)

bbs-event-processor/version.properties should be updated to reflect new version

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (6 comments)
> 
> bbs-event-processor/version.properties should be updated to reflect new version

These were the original files in BBS-ep (under 'dpo' directory).

├── blueprints
│   ├── bbs-event-processor-input.yaml
│   └── k8s-bbs-event-processor.yaml-template
├── data-formats
│   ├── aai-interaction.json
│   └── pnf-reregistration.json
└── spec
    └── bbs-event-processor-spec.json

Due to the introduction of the new repo for blueprints, I thought we would have to move complete 'dpo' directory into that. So, if I understand well, only blueprint-related files should be transferred and data-formats and spec should remain as before. Is that correct?

Piotr will comment for the keystores

Stavros - yes, only blueprints are relocated. All the other onboarding artifacts (spec/data-format) can remain under dpo folder
